settings.heading: How do I know which size to choose?
settings.row_content:
The measurements on our website are Israeli measurements and are one size smaller than the American measurements. If you usually buy size S you should buy size M.

On every product page you can find a detailed size guide according to circumferences so that you can measure and compare to your body.

If you are debating between 2 sizes, we recommend taking the smaller one.

For any consultation you can contact us using the chat bubble on the website, by email or by messaging us directly on Instagram.

settings.heading: A friend bought me a gift card - how do I use it?
settings.row_content:
Upon purchasing the gift card, your friend will receive an email with the gift card code.

After your friend gives you the gift cards' code, enter the code during the checkout process.

settings.heading: What to do if I did not receive an order confirmation email?
settings.row_content:
If you did not receive an invitation confirmation to your personal e-mail, you may have entered your details incorrectly.

In that case, you can contact our customer support center using the chat bubble on the website, by email or by messaging us directly on Instagram.

settings.heading: How soon can I cancel my order?
settings.row_content:
You can cancel your order at any time as long as the order is not packed.

If your order has been packed and shipped, you must make a return as detailed in our returns policy after receiving the package.

settings.heading: Do you ship worldwide?
settings.row_content: No, we currently deliver packges to the entire US up to 3 business days in accordance with the shipping policy of the shipping company DHL EXPRESS.

settings.heading: How can i exchange a product i did not use?
settings.row_content:
Currently, there is no option to exchange products.

You can create a return through our Return Portal.

If you encounter a particular difficulty, you can contact our customer support center through the chat bubble, email or message us directly on Instagram.

settings.heading: Do I need to pay when returning products?
settings.row_content:
The cost of returning a package is only $15.

In return, you will receive a site credit worth $15 for future orders.

The return cost will be deducted from the value of the credit you receive.

A DHL EXPRESS courier will come to your address to pick up the products you wish to return.

settings.heading: How much time do I have to return my order?
settings.row_content:
Once you receive your package, you have a 30 day window to return your products.

If your order contains an extended return window, you have 60 days instead of the initial 30 days.

settings.heading: When will I receive my refund?
settings.row_content:
As soon as we receive the products you returned, after examining and approving them, we will create your refund immediately.

If you paid by credit card - it may take up to 14 business days for you to see your refund.

The time it takes for the refund to update depends on your credit company.

settings.heading: How do I return products if I paid with a gift card?
settings.row_content: If you return products paid with a gift card, the credit for the value of the transaction will return to the payment method from which the order was placed.

settings.heading: Can I return an item if I wore / used it?
settings.row_content: Items that have been worn and/or used cannot be returned.

settings.heading: I received a faulty product, what can I do?
settings.row_content:
If you received a faulty product, you can contact our customer support center either using the chat bubble or via email.

In order to help with your case faster, we recommend preparing your full name, email address and order number (the order number can be found in the order confirmation email).

settings.heading: How can I keep posted about new collections?
settings.row_content:
Loyalty members and/or customers who have signed up to our email updates are the first to know about every new collection and campaign that is launched.

You can register easily for free on the loyalty page.
